message:
fix: search path silently drops NULL-agent hits and materializes on LIMIT

Two search-query fixes in src/search/query.rs:

1. Result enrichment query (SearchHit details): the INSERT-free path that
   hydrates message_ids into full SearchHit rows INNER-joined on agents,
   so any message whose conversation has a NULL agent_id was silently
   invisible in search results.  Switched to LEFT JOIN + COALESCE on the
   agent slug column (row.get_typed(10)? continues to deserialize as
   String).

2. Direct SQLite search (primary user-facing search path): this is the
   big one.  A 5-table JOIN (messages + conversations + agents +
   workspaces + sources) with ORDER BY m.created_at LIMIT ? OFFSET ?.
   Every paginated search on frankensqlite was hitting the
   materialization fallback described in c38edcd9/860acb12 — rebuilding
   the full Cartesian product per page — and the INNER JOIN on agents
   was also dropping legacy NULL-agent hits.  Promoted agent lookup to a
   correlated subquery wrapped in COALESCE(..., 'unknown'), and rewrote
   the agent-slug filter as an EXISTS guard against the agents table so
   it operates on the correlated lookup instead of a joined column.

Leaves the remaining LEFT JOINs on workspaces and sources in place —
they already preserve rows, and converting them would require larger
filter rewrites.  Future work if they show up on profiles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
